Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import json
data = json.loads\(open\('data/dashboard.json'\).read\(\)\)
print\(f'Dossiers in dashboard: {len\(data[\\"dossiers\\"]\)}'\)
for d in data['dossiers']:
    p = d['prospect']
    fa = d.get\('fit_assessment'\) or {}
    print\(f'  {p[\\"company_name\\"]} — Score {p[\\"score\\"]:.0f} — {fa.get\(\\"rating\\",\\"?\\"\)} — {len\(d.get\(\\"trigger_events\\",[]\)\)} triggers, {len\(d.get\(\\"conversation_entries\\",[]\)\)} convos'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
d = json.load\(open\('data/dashboard.json'\)\)
for dos in d['dossiers']:
    p = dos['prospect']
    fa = dos.get\('fit_assessment', {}\)
    contacts = [c for c in dos.get\('key_contacts', []\) if c.get\('is_priority_target'\)]
    triggers = dos.get\('trigger_events', []\)[:3]
    convos = dos.get\('conversation_entries', []\)[:2]
    print\(f"\\n=== {p['company_name']} ==="\)
    print\(f"Industry: {p.get\('industry',''\)}"\)
    print\(f"Revenue: {p.get\('revenue_estimate',''\)}, Employees: {p.get\('employee_count',''\)}"\)
    print\(f"Tier: {p.get\('tier',''\)}, Score: {p.get\('score',''\)}"\)
    print\(f"Rating: {fa.get\('rating',''\)}"\)
    print\(f"Primary Problem: {fa.get\('primary_problem',''\)}"\)
    print\(f"Best Fit: {fa.get\('best_capability_fit',''\)}"\)
    print\(f"Entry Point: {p.get\('entry_point',''\)}"\)
    print\(f"Hook: {p.get\('conversation_hook',''\)}"\)
    for c in contacts:
        print\(f"Priority Contact: {c['name']} - {c['title']} \({c.get\('priority_rationale',''\)}\)"\)
    for t in triggers[:2]:
        print\(f"Trigger: {t.get\('date',''\)} - {t['event'][:100]}"\)
    for cv in convos[:1]:
        print\(f"Opening Q: {cv['opening_question'][:100]}"\)
PYEOF)
